# mihari_on_call_rotation (Resource)

Manages a Mihari on-call rotation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mihari_on_call_rotation" "weekly" {
  on_call_calendar_id = mihari_on_call_calendar.engineering.id
  start_date          = "2025-01-06"
  start_hour          = "09:00"
  duration            = "24:00"
  repeat_days         = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
  repeat_end          = "2025-12-31"

  members = [
    { member_id = "user-uuid-1" },
    { member_id = "user-uuid-2" },
    { member_id = "user-uuid-3" }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `duration` (String) Duration (HH:MM).
- `members` (Attributes List) Rotation members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))
- `on_call_calendar_id` (String) UUID of the parent on-call calendar.
- `repeat_days` (List of Number) Days to repeat (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday).
- `repeat_end` (String) End date for repetition (YYYY-MM-DD).
- `start_date` (String) Start date (YYYY-MM-DD).
- `start_hour` (String) Start hour (HH:MM).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID of the rotation.
- `rrule` (String) Generated recurrence rule string.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Required:

- `member_id` (String) UUID of the team member.
